headings.text: Best JBL Audio Gear for Easy Home Upgrades
Upgrade Your Home Audio with JBL’s Modern Audio Solutions

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingBest JBL Audio Gear for Easy Home UpgradesPosted on July 24, 2024Upgrade Your Home Audio with JBL’s Modern Audio SolutionsJBL's new Modern Audio (MA) AV Receivers and Stage 2 Loudspeakers offer an excellent solution for audiophiles who desire superior sound quality without the need for an extensive setup.‍Simplified Audio ExcellenceJBL has crafted the MA AV Receivers and Stage 2 Loudspeakers to blend effortlessly into modern home interiors while ensuring simplicity in installation and operation. This turnkey system eliminates the guesswork involved in matching components, giving you peace of mind with a setup designed to work harmoniously.‍JBL MA510 Receiver‍Easy Setup and UpgradesThe intuitive EZ Set EQ mobile app allows for quick and accurate calibration of your system to suit your room's acoustics. Additionally, the Wi-Fi-enabled AVRs integrate with SmartThings, facilitating automated routines for a seamless audio experience. Whether you’re streaming music via Apple AirPlay, Chromecast, Bluetooth, or Spotify, JBL's system ensures smooth connectivity and control.‍JBL MA710 Receiver‍Scalable to Your NeedsWhether you’re upgrading from a basic setup or building a high-end home theater, JBL’s range of receivers and speakers can be scaled to meet your needs. Each model is optimized to deliver high performance both individually and as part of a system, so you won’t have to compromise on sound quality.‍JBL Stage 245C Center Channel‍Product Line-UpJBL MA AV Receivers:MA310: 60W, 5.2-channel, 4K support.MA510: 75W, 5.2-channel, 8K support.MA710 / MA7100HP: 110W / 125W, 7.2-channel, 8K, High Performance.MA9100HP: 140W, available in 5.1, 7.1, or 9.1 channels with Dolby Audio and DTS support.‍JBL Stage 2 Loudspeakers:Floorstanding Models: 260F and 280F.Bookshelf Models: 240B and 250B, with optional stands.Center Channel Speaker: 245C.Dolby Atmos Height Module: 240H.Subwoofers: 200P and 220P.‍JBL STAGE 280F Loudspeakers‍JBL STAGE 250B 5" Bookshelf Speaker‍JBL Stage 220P 12" Powered Subwoofer, Front‍JBL Stage 220P 12" Powered Subwoofer, Back‍Why Choose JBL?Opting for JBL's Modern Audio systems means investing in a brand synonymous with quality and innovation. The easy-to-use, scalable solutions are perfect for homeowners looking to elevate their listening experience without needing to fill their space with bulky equipment or dive deep into complex setups.For more details on these products and to see how they can transform your home audio experience, visit Harman Luxury Audio.‍Ready to upgrade your home audio? Contact us at AVIR to help you design and install the perfect JBL system for your needs.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
